case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIZ FELIPE ROBERTS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIZ FELIPE ROBERTS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED ORDER)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,282.64 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, LUIZ FELIPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
